datasets.name: Price Per Sqm Postcode District
datasets.description: Inflation-adjusted price per m² by postcode district (England & Wales, Jan 1995–present). Derived from HM Land Registry Price Paid Data joined to EPC floor areas.

schema.name: postcode_district
schema.description: UK postcode district (e.g. SW1A)

schema.name: num_sales
schema.description: Number of residential sales matched to an EPC record

schema.name: total_floor_area
schema.description: Total floor area of matched properties (m²)

schema.name: total_price
schema.description: Total transaction value of matched sales (£)

schema.name: price_per_sqm
schema.description: Nominal price per m² = total_price / total_floor_area (£). Not a mean of per-property ratios.

schema.name: adj_price_per_sqm
schema.description: CPI-adjusted price per m², base January 2026 (£). Deflated using ONS CPI series D7BT.

datasets.name: Price Per Sqm Lsoa
datasets.description: Inflation-adjusted price per m² by 2021 LSOA (England & Wales, Jan 1995–present). Derived from HM Land Registry Price Paid Data joined to EPC floor areas.

schema.name: LSOA21CD
schema.description: ONS 2021 Lower Super Output Area code (e.g. E01000001)

schema.name: num_sales
schema.description: Number of residential sales matched to an EPC record

schema.name: total_floor_area
schema.description: Total floor area of matched properties (m²)

schema.name: total_price
schema.description: Total transaction value of matched sales (£)

schema.name: price_per_sqm
schema.description: Nominal price per m² = total_price / total_floor_area (£). Not a mean of per-property ratios.

schema.name: adj_price_per_sqm
schema.description: CPI-adjusted price per m², base January 2026 (£). Deflated using ONS CPI series D7BT.

datasets.name: Price Per Sqm Yearly Postcode District
datasets.description: Inflation-adjusted price per m² by postcode district and year (England & Wales, Jan 1995–present). Powers the year-range slider on the map. Districts with fewer than 10 matched sales in a given year are excluded.

schema.name: postcode_district
schema.description: UK postcode district (e.g. SW1A)

schema.name: property_type
schema.description: Property type: ALL (rollup), D detached, F flat/maisonette, S semi-detached, T terraced, O other

schema.name: year
schema.description: Calendar year of sale

schema.name: num_sales
schema.description: Number of residential sales matched to an EPC record

schema.name: total_floor_area
schema.description: Total floor area of matched properties (m²)

schema.name: total_price
schema.description: Total transaction value of matched sales (£)

schema.name: price_per_sqm
schema.description: Nominal price per m² = total_price / total_floor_area (£). Not a mean of per-property ratios.

schema.name: adj_price_per_sqm
schema.description: CPI-adjusted price per m², base January 2026 (£). Deflated using ONS CPI series D7BT.

datasets.name: Price Per Sqm Msoa
datasets.description: Inflation-adjusted price per m² by 2021 MSOA (England & Wales, Jan 1995–Jan 2022). Derived from UPRN tier-1 matched records only (~60% of sales). Run build_msoa_page.py to generate.

schema.name: msoa21cd
schema.description: ONS 2021 Middle Super Output Area code (e.g. E02000001)

schema.name: msoa21nm
schema.description: ONS 2021 MSOA name (e.g. City of London 001)

schema.name: num_sales
schema.description: Number of residential sales matched to an EPC record

schema.name: total_floor_area
schema.description: Total floor area of matched properties (m²)

schema.name: total_price
schema.description: Total transaction value of matched sales (£)

schema.name: price_per_sqm
schema.description: Nominal price per m² = total_price / total_floor_area (£). Not a mean of per-property ratios.

schema.name: adj_price_per_sqm
schema.description: CPI-adjusted price per m², base January 2026 (£). Deflated using ONS CPI series D7BT. Derived from UPRN tier-1 matches only (~60% of sales, 1995–Jan 2022).
